rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) property tax homestead exemptions. Fam. Code §262.101 governs child protective services petitions and is entirely unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 262.101. FILING PETITION BEFORE TAKING POSSESSION OF CHILD.
_note: Rule text is from a different code title and subject matter; no intersection with the proposed homestead exemption change.
